manual_label.my_reasoning: I would test this because the price drop was a one shot event and the price immediately rebounded. The gate should have waited to see if the price drop was sustained before reacting. The seller count is rising, and roi and margin are slim, so this would be a solid test buy
manual_label.gate_missed: The gate overreacted to the 90 day price dip, which was a one shot drop, and immediately reversed. The gate should have waited to see if the price drop was sustained before reacting.
